backstory.original: Fascinated by magic at a young age when he lived in an orphanage, but lacking any ability or proficiency, Xander is not terribly good at much of anything, though something about his adorable clumsiness and childlike wonder anytime magic is being used nearby has been known to inspire those around him. Until recently, he was living on the streets of Waterdeep, scraping together just enough to survive. Now, he is a faithful member of your party, always ready to leap into the fray, even if he doesn't really seem to be able to hit much of anything.
backstory.display: 在很小的时候，住在孤儿院的他就对魔法着迷。但由于缺乏任何技能和练习，山德尔对很多事情都不太擅长。他笨拙得可爱，并且附近有人使用魔法时会有孩子般的好奇心。连他身边的人也会被他的这种性格所鼓舞。直到最近，他还生活在深水城的街头，勉强维持生计。现在他是你队伍中忠实的一员，随时准备跃入战场，尽管他似乎并不能打中什么。

description.original: Xander backstabs a random opponent. Unfortunately, he doesn't always exactly hit them.
description.display: 山德尔背刺一名随机敌人。不幸的是，他并非每次都能准确命中目标。

description.original: Xander summons a friendly neighborhood stone giant.
description.display: 山德尔召唤一个友好的邻居石巨人。

longDescription.original: Xander uses his miniature statue to summon one of Waterdeep's giant walking statues. A giant stone foot smashes all enemies from above, dealing massive damage.
longDescription.display: 山德尔用他的小雕像召唤深水城的一座巨型石雕像。巨大的石脚会从上方碾压所有敌人，造成高额伤害。

conditions.desc: Whenever $source lands a killing blow, or anyone kills an enemy affected by Distraction, there is a $amount% chance that the enemy awards double quest progress
Whenever $source lands a killing blow, there is a $amount% chance that the enemy awards double quest progress
$source秒杀敌人时，或任何队友击杀被分心所影响的敌人时，即有 $amount% 几率使该敌人提供双倍任务进度
$source秒杀敌人时，即有 $amount% 几率使该敌人提供双倍任务进度

description.desc: When $source attacks and misses an enemy, the enemy is marked and will trigger Lucky Shot no matter who lands the killing blow
$source攻击敌人并且未命中时，敌人即被标记，并在任何队员将其击杀时触发幸运一击

tipText.original: Xander causes some enemies he kills (or misses) to count for extra quest progress.
tipText.display: 山德尔将他杀死（或未命中）的部分敌人计作额外的任务进度。

description.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions in the column behind $source by $amount%
处于$source后列的所有勇士提升 $amount% 伤害

tipText.original: Xander buffs the damage of those behind him. Place him in front of your best damage dealers.
tipText.display: 山德尔使他身后的盟友伤害提高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者前方。

description.desc: Increase the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each sorcerer, warlock, or wizard champion adjacent to $source.
每有一位术士、邪术师或法师勇士与$source相邻，即提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Xander's chance to hit is even lower. Why would you even want this?
specializationDescription.display: 山德尔的命中率降低。谁会想要这个技能？

specializationDescription.original: Xander becomes more assertive, increasing his Streetwise buff.
specializationDescription.display: 山德尔更加主动，强化他的旁门左道增益。

description.original: We only survive if we stick together.
description.display: 只有团结一致，我们才能生存。

description.original: It's tough on the streets, but I survived.
description.display: 街头生活很艰难，但我还是活了下来。

description.original: I can tell you who will help us and who to avoid.
description.display: 我可以告诉你，谁会帮我们，谁会躲开我们。

description.original: I used to busk on the streets of Waterdeep, you know.
description.display: 知道吗，我曾经在深水城的街头卖艺。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Fascinated by magic at a young age when he lived in an orphanage, but lacking any ability or proficiency, Xander is not terribly good at much of anything, though something about his adorable clumsiness and childlike wonder anytime magic is being used nearby has been known to inspire those around him. Until recently, he was living on the streets of Waterdeep, scraping together just enough to survive. Now, he is a faithful member of your party, always ready to leap into the fray, even if he doesn't really seem to be able to hit much of anything.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Xander often misses with his base attack, but it's a good thing! He also buffs Champions in the column behind him and synergizes with magic Champions.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 在很小的时候，住在孤儿院的他就对魔法着迷。但由于缺乏任何技能和练习，山德尔对很多事情都不太擅长。他笨拙得可爱，并且附近有人使用魔法时会有孩子般的好奇心。连他身边的人也会被他的这种性格所鼓舞。直到最近，他还生活在深水城的街头，勉强维持生计。现在他是你队伍中忠实的一员，随时准备跃入战场，尽管他似乎并不能打中什么。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 山德尔的基本攻击经常会失误，但这是好事！他也会对身后一列的勇士和使用法术的勇士提供增益。
